questions.question: What is your full name?
questions.suggestedAnswer: My full name is {{full_name}}.
questions.guidance: State your full name exactly as it appears on official documents.
questions.tooltip: Used to verify identity against official records.
variations: Could you please state your full legal name?
What is your complete name as it appears on official documents?
Please provide your full given name and surname.
Could you confirm your full name for the record?

questions.question: How old are you?
questions.suggestedAnswer: I am {{current_age}} years old.
variations: What is your current age?
How many years old are you?
Could you tell me your age?
Please state your age in years.

questions.question: When is your date of birth?
questions.suggestedAnswer: My date of birth is {{date_of_birth}}.
variations: Could you please tell me your date of birth?
What is your birth date?
When were you born?
Please state your full date of birth.

questions.question: Where do you currently live?
questions.suggestedAnswer: I currently live in {{current_country}}.
variations: In which country do you currently reside?
What is your country of current residence?
Which country are you living in right now?
Could you please tell me where you currently reside?

questions.question: Who is petitioning for you?
questions.suggestedAnswer: My {{petitioner_relationship}}, {{petitioner_name}}, is petitioning for me.
variations: Who is sponsoring your visa application?
Could you tell me the name of the person who filed the petition on your behalf?
Who is your petitioner?
Who is the individual sponsoring your immigration to the U.S.?

questions.question: What does your son or daughter do?
questions.suggestedAnswer: My child works as {{petitioner_employment}}.
variations: What is your child's occupation?
What kind of work does your son or daughter do?
Could you describe your child's employment?
What is your child's profession?

questions.question: Where does your child live in the USA?
questions.suggestedAnswer: My child lives in {{petitioner_location}}.
variations: Where in the United States does your child reside?
Could you tell me your child's address in the U.S.?
What is your child's residential location in America?
In which U.S. state or city does your child live?

questions.question: Is your child a U.S. citizen?
questions.suggestedAnswer: Yes, my child is a U.S. citizen.
variations: Does your child hold U.S. citizenship?
What is your child's citizenship status?
Is your son or daughter a citizen of the United States?
Can you confirm if your child is a U.S. citizen?

questions.question: How long has your child been in the USA?
questions.suggestedAnswer: My child has been living in the United States for {{petitioner_us_duration}}.
variations: For how long has your child resided in the United States?
What is the duration of your child's stay in America?
When did your child first come to the U.S. to live?
How many years has your child been living in the USA?

questions.question: When was the last time you saw your child?
questions.suggestedAnswer: I last saw my child {{last_seen_child}}.
variations: Could you tell me the date of your most recent in-person meeting with your child?
When did you last have a face-to-face encounter with your child?
What was the last occasion you physically saw your son/daughter?
Could you specify when you last met your child in person?

questions.question: How often do you talk to your child?
questions.suggestedAnswer: We communicate {{communication_frequency}}.
variations: With what frequency do you communicate with your child?
How regularly do you speak with your son/daughter?
Could you describe how often you've been in contact with your child?
What is the typical frequency of your conversations with your child?

questions.question: How do you communicate with them?
questions.suggestedAnswer: We usually communicate through {{communication_method}}.
variations: What methods do you use to communicate with your child?
Through what channels do you typically stay in touch with them?
Could you explain the ways in which you communicate?
What are your usual means of contacting your son/daughter?

questions.question: Has your child visited you recently?
questions.suggestedAnswer: {{recent_visit_by_child ? 'Yes, my child has visited me recently.' : 'No, but we stay in regular contact.'}}
variations: Has your child traveled to visit you in your home country recently?
Have there been any recent visits from your child to your location?
Did your son/daughter come to see you at any point in the near past?
In recent times, has your child made a trip to visit you?

questions.question: Who will support you in the United States?
questions.suggestedAnswer: My child, {{petitioner_name}}, will support me financially.
variations: Who will be responsible for your financial support while you are in the United States?
Who will provide for your financial needs during your stay in America?
Which individual or entity will be covering your expenses in the U.S.?
Could you name the person who will be financially assisting you in the United States?

questions.question: Does your child support you financially?
questions.suggestedAnswer: {{financial_support_from_child ? 'Yes, my child supports me financially.' : 'No, I am financially independent.'}}
variations: Does your son/daughter provide you with financial assistance?
Is your child a source of financial support for you?
Does your child contribute financially to your upkeep?
Are you financially supported by your child?

questions.question: What does your child do for a living?
questions.suggestedAnswer: My child works as {{petitioner_employment}}.
variations: What is your child's profession?
Could you describe your child's employment or line of work?
What sort of work does your son/daughter do?
What is your child's current occupation?

questions.question: Where will you live in the United States?
questions.suggestedAnswer: I will live in {{us_living_location}}.
variations: Could you please specify your intended address in the U.S.?
What is your planned place of residence in America?
Where do you intend to reside during your stay in the United States?
Can you tell us your prospective living arrangements in the U.S.?

questions.question: Who will you live with?
questions.suggestedAnswer: I will live with my child, {{petitioner_name}}.
variations: With whom do you plan to share your accommodation?
Who will be your housemates or co-residents?
Can you tell us about the individuals who will be living with you?
Who will be residing at that address alongside you?

questions.question: How many people live in that house?
questions.suggestedAnswer: There are approximately {{household_size}} people in the household.
variations: What is the total number of occupants at that residence?
Could you confirm the total household size for that address?
How many individuals currently reside at the intended living location?
Including yourself, how many people will be living in that dwelling?

questions.question: Why do you want to go to the United States?
questions.suggestedAnswer: I want to go to the United States to live with my child and be reunited as a family.
variations: What is the purpose of your intended trip to the U.S.?
Could you elaborate on your reasons for wishing to visit America?
What is your primary motivation for traveling to the United States?
Please explain your objectives for seeking entry into the U.S.

questions.question: When do you plan to travel?
questions.suggestedAnswer: I plan to travel {{travel_plan}}.
variations: What is your anticipated travel date?
When do you intend to commence your journey?
Could you specify your planned departure date for the U.S.?
What is your expected timeframe for traveling to the United States?

questions.question: What will you do when you arrive in the USA?
questions.suggestedAnswer: After arriving, I will {{post_arrival_plan}} and live with my child.
variations: Can you describe your planned activities upon reaching the U.S.?
What are your immediate intentions once you arrive in America?
Could you outline your agenda after your arrival in the United States?
What do you intend to do once you have entered the U.S.?

questions.question: Have you been to the United States before?
questions.suggestedAnswer: {{previous_us_visit ? 'Yes, I have visited before.' : 'No, I have never been to the United States.'}}
variations: Have you previously visited the United States?
Do you have any prior travel history to America?
Is this your first time applying to travel to the U.S., or have you been before?
Have you made any previous trips to the United States?

questions.question: Have you ever been denied a visa?
questions.suggestedAnswer: {{visa_refusal ? 'Yes, and I have disclosed it honestly.' : 'No, I have never been denied a visa.'}}
variations: Have you ever experienced a visa refusal?
Has a visa application ever been denied to you?
Have you previously been refused a visa for any country?
Have you ever received an unfavorable decision on a visa application?

questions.question: Have you stayed in another country for more than 6 months?
questions.suggestedAnswer: {{long_stay_history ? 'Yes, and the details are provided in my application.' : 'No, I have not stayed in another country for more than 6 months.'}}
variations: Have you ever resided in a foreign country for a continuous period exceeding six months?
At any time, have you remained in a country other than your country of origin for a duration longer than half a year?
Have you spent more than six months living in any single country outside of your nationality?
Is there any instance where your presence in a foreign nation extended beyond a six-month period?

questions.question: Do you have any criminal record?
questions.suggestedAnswer: {{criminal_record ? 'Yes, and it has been disclosed.' : 'No, I do not have any criminal record.'}}
variations: Do you have any prior criminal convictions?
Have you ever been found guilty of a criminal offense?
Is there any official record of criminal activity pertaining to you?
Do you have any documented criminal history?
